extract: The Lysandre Labs (Japanese: フラダリラボ Fuladari Labs) is the moniker of the hideout located behind a china cabinet in Lysandre Café, which is located in Lumiose City's Magenta Plaza, serving as one of Team Flare's headquarters. It is also the location from which the ultimate weapon is activated. It is explored in both Pokémon X and Y and Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
